location: Looted from a corpse in Stormveil Castle, resting under a large painting inside the chamber patrolled by the roaming Grafted Scion — across from the room housing the elevator shortcut up to Rampart Tower.
tactics: The Grafted Scion here is an optional enemy that hits far harder than anything else this early — bait its slow overhead slam and roll away rather than trading hits directly
You don't have to kill the Grafted Scion to grab the axe; you can sprint around it to the painting, loot the corpse, and retreat
The Rampart Tower grace and its elevator shortcut sit directly across the hall, making it a quick spot to reset if the encounter goes wrong
lore: A single-edged battle axe carried by highland warriors who announce themselves with a roar before the fight even begins — simply holding it amplifies the power of the wielder's own battle cries.

builds.name: Roar/Beast build
builds.why: Passively boosts the strength of roar-type skills like Barbaric Roar and Beast's Roar by 10% while held in an active hand slot, stacking with Bestial talismans.

builds.name: Quality Strength/Dex
builds.why: Shares the Battle Axe's balanced D/D scaling, so it works as a straightforward quality two-hander outside of its roar niche.
